title: chat.closed
description: Published by Chat Service when a chat room is closed. Consumed by Rating Service (prompt both users to rate) and Notification Service (inform both users).
_comment_saga: chat.closed is a critical saga step. It triggers the rating phase — the final step in the connection lifecycle. If both users mark Met Successfully, closed_reason is met_successfully. Timeout and admin_closed are the two compensating paths.
_comment_closed_reason: Enum over free text — restricts the state machine to known transitions. A service cannot accidentally send an unrecognised reason that a consumer silently ignores.

chat_id.description: The MongoDB chat room document ID.

connection_id.description: The connection this chat was associated with.

user_a_id.description: One participant — corresponds to requester_id from connection.accepted.

user_b_id.description: Other participant — corresponds to recipient_id from connection.accepted.

closed_reason.description: Why the chat was closed. Rating Service only prompts users if reason is met_successfully.
